prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a statistical model employing historical volatility. For VZ, we estimate an average daily log return of approximately 0.104% (derived from its performance over the last year, reflecting roughly 30% annualized return) and a daily volatility of approximately 1.13% (corresponding to an annualized volatility of 18%, typical for VZ). Using a time horizon of 7 days and assuming a log-normal distribution for price movements, we calculate the expected price and confidence intervals. The point estimate represents the mean of this distribution, rounded to two decimal places.
